title: Animals Plus
description: This mod adds various crops, foods, crafting recipes and a mob to the game
body:
## Description
Currently, minecraft only has a very limited amount of crops. This mod enhances the game by adding additional custom crops while keeping a vanilla feel.
The new Turkey mob roams in forests and plains biomes, waiting to be served at Thanksgiving. This mod encourages the player to expand their fields and try out different foods.

## Features:
- Crops (Lettuce, Tomato, Leek, Corn, Rice, Cucumber)
- Seeds are obtained when breaking short grass with any Hoe Item
- Foods (Bread Rolls, Burger, Popcorn, Sushi)
- Crafting recipes (recipes for new items)
- Tools and Armor (new netherstar tier)
- Blocks (dirt slabs, calcite slab wall and stairs)
- Turkey Entity (spawns in forests and plains)

view Gallery for details

## Disclaimer
This is the first mod I made and will only be updated whenever I feel like it. You can use it in any modpack or server you want.
